posts.caption:
Freeze-dried compounds are stable - until heat and light get involved. Cold, dark, dry, and steady beats a fridge door that opens 40 times a day.

-
Research & educational use only. Not medical advice.

posts.onImageText: Half-life, simply. Why timing isn't random. Half gone, then half again. Short half-life = it clears fast. The Indexa Standard: every compound ships with a third-party COA. Research & educational use only. Not medical advice.
posts.caption:
Half-life is just how long until half is gone, then half again. Short half-life clears fast; long one lingers. It's why research timing is never random.

-
Research & educational use only. Not medical advice.

#aminoacids #researchcompounds #biochemistry #COA #labtested #sciencetok #fyp
